  - metric: task-completion-rate
    target: 65%

## Why

The initial quick-create flow didn't support due dates, and task completion
rate plateaued well below target because tasks with no due date were rarely
finished. This revision adds a due-date field and a target for completion
rate.

## Scope

- Everything from the initial version
- Optional due date at creation time
- New: also tracked against weekly-active-users, since due-date reminders
  are expected to bring users back into the product mid-week
